author: DominicVainMod
content:
@everyone

Crew Cards Utility in SAGE - Get Ready Now

Hey everyone, thank you all so much for your patience as we get ready to launch Crew Cards utility in SAGE!

The time is finally here! We’re going to be turning Crew Card utility on next Thursday, September 12. This means all fleets will be destroyed + sent back to your CSS and you will have to remake your fleets on that date, when the update goes live. 

Importing and withdrawing your Crew Cards to and from SAGE is also online and ready to use. We’ll be implementing improvements throughout next week that will make this process faster as well.

 | https://based.staratlas.com/
